zh.Battle Of Homildon Hill, Northumberland,: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonetta Keith於1335年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾加爾斯頓時，她的父親Sir William Keith38歲，母親Janet More35歲。她於1369年與David Hamilton在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1421年在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonetta Keith于1335年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾加爾斯頓时，她的父亲Sir William Keith38岁，母亲Janet More35岁。她于1369年与David Hamilton在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1421年在英国苏格兰雷福福爾享年86岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾達利。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Jonetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Janet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonetta Keith was born in 1335, in Galston, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir William Keith, was 38 and her mother, Janet More, was 35. She married David Hamilton in 1369, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1421, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonetta Keith est née en 1335, à Galston, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Keith, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Janet More, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé David Hamilton en 1369, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1421, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonetta Keith 1335 in Galston, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Keith 38 und ihre Mutter Janet More 35. Sie hat 1369 in Ayrshire, Scotland David Hamilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1421 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonetta Keith è nata il nel 1335 nel Galston, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William Keith, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Janet More, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato David Hamilton nel 1369, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1421, nel Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Jonetta Keithが1335年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアガルストンで生まれた時，父Sir William Keithは38歳，母Janet Moreは35歳であった。1369年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでDavid Hamiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1421年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで86歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonetta Keith(이)가 1335년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 갈스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Keith(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet More(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1369년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 David Hamilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에 묻혔다.

mn.Battle Of Homildon Hill, Northumberland,: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonetta Keith nasceu em 1335, em Galston, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Keith, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Janet More, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com David Hamilton em 1369, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1421, em Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonetta Keith родилась в 1335 г. в местности галстон, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William Keith было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet More, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Hamilton в 1369 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1421 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonetta Keith nació en 1335, en Galston, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Keith, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Janet More, tenía 35 años. Se casó con David Hamilton en 1369, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1421, en Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
